meta.title: Nawar Alissa Portfolio
meta.description: Front-End Developer crafting modern, elegant web experiences.

hero.tagline: I craft stellar web experiences with modern technologies. Specializing in front-end development, I build interfaces that are both beautiful and functional.

about.subtitle: Passionate Web Developer & Tech Creator
about.paragraph1: With over 3 years of experience in web development, I specialize in creating responsive, accessible, and performant web applications using modern technologies like React, Tailwind CSS, and Next.js.
about.paragraph2: I'm passionate about crafting elegant solutions to complex problems, and I'm constantly learning new technologies to stay at the forefront of the ever-evolving web landscape.
